code: import React from'react';import{kelvinToCelsius,kelvinToFahrenheit,formatHour,getWeatherEmoji}from'../utils/weatherUtils';import'./HourlyChart.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const HourlyChart=_ref=>{let{hourly,loading,unit}=_ref;if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card hourly-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-title",children:"24-Hour Forecast"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"hourly-skeleton-row",children:[...Array(8)].map((_,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"skeleton hourly-skel-item"},i))})]});if(!hourly||hourly.length===0)return null;const temps=hourly.map(h=>unit==='C'?kelvinToCelsius(h.temp):kelvinToFahrenheit(h.temp));const min=Math.min(...temps);const max=Math.max(...temps);const range=max-min||1;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card hourly-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-title",children:"\uD83D\uDD50 24-Hour Forecast"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"hourly-scroll",children:hourly.map((h,i)=>{const t=temps[i];const barH=20+(t-min)/range*50;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"hourly-item",style:{animationDelay:`${i*0.04}s`},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"h-time",children:formatHour(h.dt)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"h-emoji",children:getWeatherEmoji(h.code)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"h-bar-wrapper",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"h-bar",style:{height:`${barH}px`},title:`${h.desc} — ${Math.round(t)}°${unit}`})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"h-temp",children:[Math.round(t),"\xB0"]}),h.pop>0.1&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"h-pop",children:["\uD83D\uDCA7",Math.round(h.pop*100),"%"]})]},i);})})]});};export default HourlyChart;
